creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Raphael Kubo da Costa from comment #13)
> OK, I've rebuilt world here with your patch, but got the same error when
> installing it with MK_SYSTEM_COMPILER=no.
> 

Do you have the full output for the installworld?

Can you also cat /usr/obj/usr/src/compiler-metadata.mk  to here?
